British supplement maker Huel bought by Danone for €1bnThe health firm backed by actor Idris Elba and broadcaster Jonathan Ross is being bought by Danone for €1bn (£860m). https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czre7pl600go?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czre7pl600go#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 15:50:44 GMT
